reviews.review_description: I love whichblood very much, please make more games like this. I like being in virtual reality but there's nothing like witchblood and actually witchblood is the only game like this. I got my friend playing it not because she gets sick in VR, please hear me out and consider giving us another game like witchblood or even mor witchblood games. You have an audience that absolutely love games like this. absolutely five stars ✨✨✨✨✨

reviews.review_title: Great Game!  But it was too short ...
reviews.review_description:
Great Game! Great Graphics! 

I hope the Developers add more levels to it!

The graphics and presentation are decent and the shadowbox aspect is definitely cool, especially in MR (although passthrough will chew through your battery). The controls feel okay, if not slightly sluggish, but work well enough with the Quest controllers.

The exploration and combat, however, leave much to be desired. Combat is extremely simplistic and more of an annoyance than satisfaction. World/ability progression isn't horrible (I like how the power-ups play out wrt spellbooks), but it's boring, the pacing is odd and back-tracking is a pain due to design and the god-awful map. The map presentation, in my opinion, is the worst I've seen in a game like this; very confusing and hard to even see well enough to plot routes (which again, are very limited).

This game isn't bad, but it's definitely not great. I wouldn't recommend it if you're a fan of the genre as it's a very diluted example.

Simple but great mixed reality experience. I love the look of the diorama floating in my living room. This game is easy to get started with and hard to out down.

Wish there was more of a reward to killing the enemies, and that the game was longer.

At its core, this is a pretty generic platformer with some light Metroidvania mechanics. You gain new weapons, spells, and strength in different categories as you progress. The combat works fine, the story is ok, and the first boss battle I encountered was quite fun. 

So why five stars? Because there's nothing else like it on the Quest. I wish there was. The ability to zoom into and out of the level/diorama is a neat mechanic that reminds me of Triangle Strategy with its maps.

reviews.review_title: A pure,  artistic game for everyone
reviews.review_description: A good hearted game that has great art and is interesting to explore as you move through the game.  I love how while you see the current room you’re in directly in front of you, the rest of the map is visible on the vertical wall around the current place space.  ￼￼￼The art, dialogue, and voice acting creates an intriguing, unified world to explore.￼￼

Nice diorama optics, was through after 4 hours and feel no need to try it in hard or discover more secrets. Just standard 2D Jump & Run with no highlights. No outro after last endboss feels a little disappointing although I was entertained during playing.

Have double jump but it’s still not enough to reach the lever to unlock the door so I’m trapped literally would have to completely restart the game and I’m not doing that so deleted and refunded is where this game ended up on my playlist however I was thoroughly enjoying the game before that fun game just be careful or might have to completely restart which is unacceptable
This game is incredible. One of the best vr experiences I've had. Love the gameplay. Love the visuals.
I literally only bought this so I could get the book in Gtag, and I did get the book so cool beans

reviews.review_title: Gave up…trying again. Please add hints!
reviews.review_description:
I bought this last year and spent forever and a day stuck and frustrated before requesting a refund. I loved the game but it became impossible to progress and I was stuck. I know I could join the discord or something to figure it out, but that’s not ideal and I just want the ability for the map to be useful for getting unstuck or optional hints like in Escaping Wonderland or something. I do weirdly miss this game and apparently like banging my head into a wall from frustration and despair… so I bought it again  😂😩😵‍💫🫠 

Please update this with hints or help, I see other people in the reviews asking too 😕😩.

I always imagined a future where i would be playing 3D Nintendo games with better graphics. 
I never imagined FPS, or VR style gaming.  Just the classic side scrollers that got better looking and 3D. 😂

This game is so fun to play, and earning power ups keeps it interesting. I just wish the boosts in ability happened more frequently. 
Other than that, I love this game!!!

Genuine Castlevania / Metroid game. Really very fun, a little hidden gem!

However, I don't feel that touch controllers are the best method of control for this game genre, the game really needs Bluetooth Gamepad support.  Here's hoping the devs will consider adding this in the near future.
A Must Play, Awesome Game Love The Graphics! By Far My Favorite Game To Play!
I remember playing this on Oculus Go a long time a go.  In MR, it is better and the graphics are nice.  Short game but worth it
this is so much fun. Highly recommended
It's a fairly basic game but still fun. I gave up after finding the sword - I couldn't find how to progress after this. Maybe have more guidance for those that want it?
Simple and great game

I don’t care what anybody says. It’s like a goofy Castlevania. It needs more items pick up from monsters. I gave it a four out of five because the side grow, but that’s what gives it’s charm, but yeah, I enjoyed it

I really want to like this game, but whenever I finish moving the character to the right, she instantly turns to face the left.

For what it's worth, I have experienced zero stick drift in every other game in my library. Kind of makes Witchblood unplayable, which is a shame, because it's a cool idea otherwise.

One day we will all play games this way and believe me this is the best way.
I absolutely love the way this game looks,  it's beautiful to look at with gameplay to match. 10/10.

Worthwhile time spent.
Brilliantly captivating and a nice challenge to complete (use map).
Could be longer, so I hope there’s a sequel. Great style and layout unlocked old part of brain used when maps were hand drawn.
I never could beat the final boss but I don't care. The gameplay to get there was really fun and engaging. I loved how the world looked.

This game is great, most of the 1 star comments are kids whining because they didn't get some Gorilla Tag cosmetic that apparently was given if you played more than 2 hours, so don't take them serious. Beautiful metroidvanian game, not easy but also not impossible.
Great side scroller platformer. Not too difficult. Had fun solving puzzles and only got stuck a couple times.  Well done!

The game looks *wonderful* in a way the screenshots can't convey! Especially played on a Quest 3 with "Quest Games Optimizer" enabled to make things look extra crisp.

I picked this up hoping for a 'good enough' "we have VR metroidvanias at home," vibe, but man is thing has been blowing away my expectations with how it feels and looks to play.
Great fun beginning to end!! More like this, please!

I never thought a sidescroller in VR could be as cool,
In person is much more impressive than in the videos

Kudos to Dev Team for making this masterpiece
The best VR game anyone can play. It's another version of prince of Persia for VR head set
Such a fun game really enjoyed playing this
Challenging level game. Good fun and good price....

What a brilliantly well crafted game. I'm just hoping that there will either be an additional dlc or a Sequal. Everything is perfect 👌. Would love to see this sort of story in a 3d Sabre Wolf/Attic Attack (ZX Spectrum) Environment.

Had this way back on the quest. Since got a quest 3 and this game looks incredible in mixed reality it's just made the whole experience better in every way, the dioramas look awesome and mixed reality us seamless. Such a fun game and looks brilliant. Cant believe how cheap it wa on sale too. If your on the fence just go and buy it even at full price it's worth every penny A++

This game looked good at first but as you play more it's just confusing like there is multiple directions to go but I have no idea where to go and why put this in vr it's so weird in my opinion don't buy it but one more thing I usually get stuck on jump stuff for 30 min and when I complete it it's just the magic blue stuff when I could just walk for 1 min to a save thing it refill my magic blue stuff

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear you are getting stuck. If you'd like tips and tricks come over to our discord and well do our best to help! 
https://discord.gg/hiddenpath

reviews.review_title: So I got the gorilla tag cosmetic in2025
reviews.review_description: So it was very easy

As sidescrollers go, this 1 is fun. Its nothing fancy just a solid puzzle action sidescroller. Music, graphics, controls are al good. Personaly it reminded me of the old prins and persia games with updated depth 3d graphics but Castlevania works to. The only flaw that i could notice is the good old tedious mechanic of "stuff it full of enemies that slowly windel away health and magic, with no heals close by" ones in a while. All in all i would give it a solid 7 out of 10. As most reviews nowadays are fake and/or written by....those sort of people who a mother calls "special". Just go and watch some youtube review/video on whats it all about. Never mind after reading the 1 star reviews about not getting the skin, i upped the score to 5 stars, i maniacally laughed so hard at the salty tears that were shed. You peeps deserve the 5 stars!
Game sucked want money back

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you didn't enjoy Witchblood.  You can contact Meta for a refund if you are within the policy rules.

reviews.review_description: That STUPID Rat enemy I have no idea how to avoid I can’t jump his knives can’t duck and he can jump with 4 health that freaking stupid I’ve just started I’m on the easiest difficulty and I’m already mad and I don’t get made at single player games easy. If I could cheat I would. Too long of a dungeon. It feels like a walking simulater where you die over and over again. I hate it cause I need to be here for just enough time that I can’t refund it all for a cosmetic in another game. I hate it. If I had any degree or knowledge of making games I could make this easily. This should be a computer game. It’s got literally nothing to do with VR

reviews.review_description: So I downloaded this game for two reasons. One, to find a game new to play, and 2, To see if this is moneys worth. Before I continue, I did NOT know about after 2h 15m you can’t refund games. So I would put a 3hr timer and play the game then at the end of the 3 hours I would see if I liked it or I would like to refund it. I never refunded till today. Atleast i tried to refund. You see as I previously stated, There is a limit to how long you can have a game before not being able to refund it. I was not informed of that. I realized dungeon games aren’t really my type of games so I tried to refund. It was not approved. I want my money back.

reviews.review_title: A true gem of a game
reviews.review_description:
Witch Blood transforms the classic side scroller genre into a gorgeous visual diorama full of virtual action and adventure. Each level is full of delightful graphics, unique enemies, clever terrain, and obstacles to overcome along with puzzles thrown in here and there. 

The game has been around for quite a few years now on the PCVR store, but it has now been ported to stand alone for the Metaquest 2, 3, and Pro so you'll now be able to enjoy this gem of a game without the need for a PC. 

I have really enjoyed playing Witch Blood and highly recommend to anyone who wants a fun, relaxing, casual game to play while chilling out on the lounge. 

I'm happy to give this game a big thumbs up and a score of 5 out of 5. 

It's a true gem of a game.

reviews.review_title: Game is fun I got my gorilla tag book
